title: Mailbox
description: Add mailboxes to your world to easily communicate with your friends
body:
Send mail to your friend to easily communicate with them.
This datapack add 5 new items to allow you and your friends to exchange informations even if your are not connected at the same time : - The **Mailbox** : place this new block wherever you want in the world. You will receive your mails here. When installing your first mailbox, you will need to register yourself to the postal office by using a default stamp on the box.
The bat hanging from your mailbox will allow you to send mail across the server. However, bats can only transport mails that have been sealed by using a registered stamp.
Mailboxes can be customised by changing their stand and roof material (any fence/wall block and any slab) by right clicking their stand with the desired material in hand. To reset their default appearance, you can use shears

- The **Stamp** : craft this item with a stick, a copper ingot and some honeycomb. It will allow you to 1) register your mailbox ; 2) ensure to your friends that the mail is coming from you. This item cannot be used by other players once you register it (right click on your mailbox)
Right click with it while holding a filled envelope in your offhand to stamp it. Using a default stamp will result in an anonymous mail. Anonymous mail cannot be given to bats but can be put directly inside mailboxes

- The **Letter paper** : needed to write your letters. Use it like a default writable book

- The **Envelope** : needed to keep your letters safe when sending them across the server. Right click with the envelope while holding a letter in your offhand to put it inside the envelope

- The **Stamp book** : needed to choose to whom you will send the mail. Mails can also be put directly in your friends mailbox with no need of the stamp book
